Registry / Terms / adjustment

adjustment

VIMOutdated — VIM 2007 G 18 #02129 · 6 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 2007 · concept #3.11view ↗

set of operations carried out on a *measuring system* so that it provides prescribed *indications* corresponding to given *values* of a *quantity* to be measured

Outdated: Cites VIM 2007. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 2007 · #3.11
    set of operations carried out on a *measuring system* so that it provides prescribed *indications* corresponding to given *values* of a *quantity* to be measured

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012.
  2. MEDIUM 6 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

6 distinct definitions across 6 publications.

6 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)
